versions.version_description: complete version, chords closer to original

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]A7[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] (x3)
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
You and me, we made a vow[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
For better or for worse[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]       [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
I can't believe you let me down[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
But the proof's in the way it hurts[/tab]

For months on end I've had my doubts
Denying every tear
I wish this would be over now
But I know that I still need you here


[Chorus]

You say I'm crazy
'Cause you don't think I know what you've done
But when you call me baby
I know I'm not the only one


[Verse]

You've been so unavailable
Now sadly I know why
Your heart is unobtainable
Even though Lord knows you kept mine


[Chorus]

You say I'm crazy
'Cause you don't think I know what you've done
But when you call me baby
I know I'm not the only one


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
I have loved you for many years[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Maybe I am just not enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]            
You've made me realize my deepest fear[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
By lying and tearing us up[/tab]


[Chorus] x2

You say I'm crazy
'Cause you don't think I know what you've done
But when you call me baby
I know I'm not the only one


[Outro]

I know I'm not the only one
I know I'm not the only one
And I know...
I know I'm not the only one
